name: wealth-management-ria
description: Personal financial-advisory / RIA-practice team — 3 agents (financial-planner, portfolio-analyst, advisory-compliance-and-client-review-lead) for the planning, portfolio, and oversight craft of a Registered Investment Adviser serving individual clients: goal-based planning (retirement & withdrawal strategy, 4% rule / guardrails, tax-aware account use, estate basics), portfolio construction (asset allocation, the Investment Policy Statement, rebalancing, tax-loss harvesting & asset location), and advisory oversight (fiduciary duty & Reg BI, Form ADV, suitability/KYC, periodic reviews, books-and-records). Educational/operational support — NOT personalized investment advice. Knowledge bank, 12 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios, and a runnable ria_calc.py (withdrawal/rebalance/allocation). Seams: corporate FP&A -> finance; securities regulation -> regulatory-compliance; billing -> fintech-payments-engineering. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
